articles.title: Venezuela beats Team USA to claim World Baseball Classic - BBC
articles.description: The Venezuelans defeated Team USA 3-2 in Miami on Tuesday, in a thrilling final.

articles.title: Japan’s Takaichi Visits Trump as Hormuz Warship Standoff Simmers - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi warned she’s facing an “extremely difficult” meeting with Donald Trump, after the US president criticized Japan for rebuffing his demand for warships to help secure the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: About 90 ships cross the Strait of Hormuz as Iran exports millions of barrels of oil despite the war - AP News
Suspected meteor falling over Cleveland could be seen several states away - KSL.com
articles.description: A suspected meteor that fell from the sky over the Cleveland area shook homes and startled residents who heard a boom that some compared to an explosion.

articles.title: See full results for 2026 Illinois primary elections - CBS News
articles.description: Candidates for governor, U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and Cook County Board President were among the races on the ballot in the 2026 Illinois primary election on Tuesday.

articles.title: La Shawn Ford wins Dem primary to succeed Illinois Rep. Danny Davis - Politico
articles.description: The state representative is the favorite to win in November after emerging from a contentious, expensive race for Illinois’ deep-blue 7th district.

articles.title: You'll need these documents to vote if the SAVE Act passes - USA Today
articles.description: Trump and Republicans say the SAVE Act will ensure election integrity. Democrats and others say millions would be unfairly prevented from voting.

articles.title: China ignores Trump’s Hormuz request as the Iran war deepens and his Beijing trip slips - AP News
articles.description: Analysts say China is unlikely to help the U.S. reopen the Strait of Hormuz, and it is probably welcoming a delay in President Donald Trump’s Beijing trip. The Iran war has dragged into a third week and oil shipments through the strait are stalled. U.S. allie…

articles.title: 2026 NFL Draft: Daniel Jeremiah makes major changes in mock 3.0 after early free agency moves - On3
articles.description: Following free agency moves around the league, Daniel Jeremiah has released mock 3.0 for the 2026 NFL Draft.

articles.title: ‘The Bachelorette’ Star Taylor Frankie Paul On Domestic Violence Allegations: “It’s A Heavy Time, And It’s Unfortunate” - Deadline
articles.description: Ahead of The Bachelorette premiere, Taylor Frankie Paul is addressing the domestic violence allegations she is involved in that halted production of Hulu's The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives.

articles.title: ‘Philosophical differences’: Iran war exposes rifts in Trump’s Maga base - Financial Times
articles.description: Tensions spill over after counterterrorism chief quits with letter criticising rationale for the conflict

articles.title: Arizona AG files criminal charges against Kalshi over 'illegal gambling' - NPR
articles.description: Arizona is the first state to allege the prediction market company has committed criminal violations, accusing it of running an unlicensed gambling operation.

articles.title: Lululemon Gives Weak Sales Outlook, Adding to Company’s Troubles (LULU) - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Struggling retailer Lululemon Athletica Inc. forecast a second-straight year of profit declines, further pressuring a brand that’s dealing with product mishaps while searching for a new chief executive officer.

articles.title: Two people killed, several wounded following overnight Iranian missile barrage - The Jerusalem Post
articles.description: Eight suspected shrapnel impact sites were reported following Iran's overnight missile barrage on Israel, including on the Tel Aviv Savidor Center train station.

articles.title: The Style Winners and Sinners of the Oscars - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: It was a mostly good night for style. But why must the A-listers save all the best looks for the afterparty?

articles.title: Texas Republicans' Senate runoff moves forward as withdrawal deadline passes - NBC News
articles.description: The Republican primary runoff in Texas' Senate race will continue, with the deadline for a candidate to drop out of the race passing on Tuesday as President Donald Trump weighs backing Sen. John Cornyn or state Attorney General Ken Paxton.
